## Summary

Describe the problem and the behavior changed by this pull request.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests were added or updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes.
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] No secrets, prompts, or sensitive trace data are included.

## Risk

Note security, compatibility, migration, or rollback considerations. Write `None` when not applicable.
